self.__next_f.push([1,"{\"id\":\"nade_bc477d5e8716\",\"slug\":\"top-mid-from-t-spawn\",\"team\":\"t\",\"type\":\"smoke\",\"titleFrom\":\"T Spawn\",\"titleTo\":\"Top Mid\",\"throwFrom\":{\"x\":455,\"y\":874},\"throwTo\":{\"x\":484,\"y\":366},\"movement\":\"stationary\",\"technique\":\"left_jump\",\"precision\":\"precise\",\"beginner\":true,\"assets\":{\"thumbnail\":\"https://assets.csnades.gg/nades/ancient-smoke-mhHNTLDnNw/thumbnail.webp\",\"lineup\":\"https://assets.csnades.gg/nades/ancient-smoke-mhHNTLDnNw/lineup.webp\",\"videoHq\":{\"webm\":\"https://assets.csnades.gg/nades/ancient-smoke-mhHNTLDnNw/hq.webm\"}}}"]);
